untranslatable_reason: Broadening pattern requires identification of expanding trend-line divergence (higher highs AND lower lows simultaneously) and measurement of pattern height/width relative to median values. This geometric expansion property cannot be fully expressed using point-in-time indicators. The pattern also specifies performance improvement with 'greater height and width'—a comparative metric requiring historical pattern database analysis rather than real-time indicator conditions. Converted entry uses volatility expansion (bb_bandwidth, range) and outside-bar logic as proxies, but this misses the core trend-line divergence requirement.
